evidenceSnippetOriginal: dAIsy uses University SSO and auditing. Logs (prompts/metadata) are retained for operational monitoring. Model providers are configured to not train on your data.
evidenceLocator: dAIsy Use Policy Section 6 - Data handling, security and privacy
